message:
🌱 fix: openfeature install mission drift (pre-outreach validation) (#2047)

* 🔧 fix: openfeature mission drift — cert-manager prereq, helm repo/release rename, remove fabricated resource limits

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🔧 fix: bump open-feature-operator container image to v0.9.0

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🔧 fix(ci): tighten Helm URL regex in mission-content-validation so it stops at JSON delimiters

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -107,8 +107,8 @@ jobs:
             d = json.load(open('$f'))
             text = json.dumps(d)
             # Find helm repo add commands
-            for m in re.finditer(r'helm repo add \S+ (\S+)', text):
-              url = m.group(1).rstrip('\\\\n').rstrip('\"')
+            for m in re.finditer(r'helm repo add \S+ (https?://[^\s\"\\\\]+)', text):
+              url = m.group(1).rstrip('.,;)')
               if not url.startswith('oci://'):
                 print(url)
             # Check helmRepoUrl field
